# NovaKit

> NovaKit makes Claude AI skills — downloadable prompt tools that run inside Claude to produce professional-grade outputs in under 3 minutes.

## Priority Pages

- [Home](https://novakit.tech/): NovaKit — Claude AI skills for founders, sales, and business professionals
- [All Skills](https://novakit.tech/#skills): Browse all available Claude skills
- [Cold Outreach Email](https://novakit.tech/skills/cold-outreach-email): Claude skill that writes 3 role-calibrated cold email variants with 9 subject lines — $9
- [Blog](https://novakit.tech/blog/): Guides and deep-dives on using Claude skills effectively

## Key Topics

- Cold outreach email: https://novakit.tech/skills/cold-outreach-email
- Why cold emails get deleted: https://novakit.tech/blog/why-cold-emails-get-deleted
- Cold email guide: https://novakit.tech/blog/cold-outreach-email
- Founder Bundle (6 skills): https://novakit.tech/#skills
